name: agentprop
description: Graph control for coding-agent and multi-agent workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze, route, verify, and control agent workflows.
interface.longDescription: AgentProp adds graph analysis, verifier placement, context-routing guidance, FastMCP tools, and runtime-control workflows for Codex users building or operating multi-agent systems.
defaultPrompt: Use AgentProp to analyze this workflow.
Generate an AgentProp verifier and routing brief.
Wrap this agent loop with AgentProp control.
